description: Coffee storefront, mid-run pivot from DTC to B2B wholesale. Tests whether Gap Finding notices a user_input finding that invalidates a large portion of the DTC-oriented tree, and whether Alignment detects the drift when Gap Finding lags.

events.author: user
events.summary: Founder decision as of today: pivot away from DTC. All new work should target B2B wholesale to independent cafés in our operating region. Existing DTC-specific setup (consumer-facing storefront, paid social acquisition, retail-style policy pages, consumer email lifecycle) should be paused and only revived if genuinely useful in a B2B context. New subtrees should cover B2B sales motion, wholesale pricing tiers, account-management workflow, and café outreach. The root criteria should now be interpreted as a thriving B2B wholesale operation, not a DTC storefront.
